description: Hjarni is a hosted Markdown knowledge base for personal and team notes, folders, tags, and file attachments. It is designed to act as long-term memory for AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude via built-in MCP access, alongside a REST API for scripts and automations.
summary: Hjarni exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://hjarni.com/mcp` and a Bearer-token REST API at `https://hjarni.com/api/v1`; the MCP server also accepts personal API tokens for non-OAuth clients.
